_comment: Swamp village petshop spawns. Used by: swamp, swamp_fortified. Kept as a separate profile per user instruction (not merged with forest). All cage markers in this biome roll against this same weighted list; only the per-cage spawn count varies (cage_0/2: 1-2, cage_1: 2-3, cage_3: 1). Aquatic mobs (axolotl, etc.) live in the fishtank profile instead — dry cages here are land-based only.
